# Data Source: okta_devices

Get a list of devices from Okta.

## Example Usage

{{tffile "/Users/rmcgregor/Development/terraform-provider-okta/examples/data-sources/okta_devices/data-source.tf"}}

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `search` (String) A SCIM filter expression that filters the results. Searches include all Device profile properties and the Device id, status, and lastUpdated properties.

### Read-Only

- `devices` (List of Object) The list of devices. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--devices))

<a id="nestedatt--devices"></a>
### Nested Schema for `devices`

Read-Only:

- `created` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `last_updated` (String)
- `profile` (Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedobjatt--devices--profile))
- `resource_alternate_id` (String)
- `resource_display_name` (Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedobjatt--devices--resource_display_name))
- `resource_id` (String)
- `resource_type` (String)
- `status` (String)

<a id="nestedobjatt--devices--profile"></a>
### Nested Schema for `devices.profile`

Read-Only:

- `disk_encryption_type` (String)
- `display_name` (String)
- `imei` (String)
- `integrity_jail_break` (Boolean)
- `manufacturer` (String)
- `meid` (String)
- `model` (String)
- `os_version` (String)
- `platform` (String)
- `registered` (Boolean)
- `secure_hardware_present` (Boolean)
- `serial_number` (String)
- `sid` (String)
- `tpm_public_key_hash` (String)
- `udid` (String)


<a id="nestedobjatt--devices--resource_display_name"></a>
### Nested Schema for `devices.resource_display_name`

Read-Only:

- `sensitive` (Boolean)
- `value` (String)
